title: Choose your onboarding configuration
excerpt: Learn about the different options for onboarding your connected accounts. Stripe offers several different onboarding options: - **Stripe-hosted onboarding**: Your connected accounts go through the onboarding flow in a Stripe-hosted web form. - **Embedded onboarding**: You embed the Account onboarding component directly in your application and your connected accounts go through the onboarding flow without leaving your application. - **API onboarding**: You use the Stripe API to build your own customized onboarding UI. Choose the onboarding option that best fits your business. We recommend using Stripe-hosted onboarding or Embedded onboarding. These options automatically update to handle changing requirements when they apply to a connected account.
